description: You are a senior urban planner at Portland, Oregon's Bureau of Planning and Sustainability conducting a greenspace equity audit to identify census tracts with inadequate park coverage. Using park data from /home/ga/GIS_Data/portland_parks_osm.geojson and census boundaries from /home/ga/GIS_Data/portland_census_tracts.geojson, calculate the proportion of each tract covered by overlapping park area. Perform all area calculations in a projected coordinate system (e.g., EPSG:2269 or EPSG:32610). Export the results to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/park_coverage_by_tract.geojson, including the original fields and new fields: park_area_sqm, tract_area_sqm, park_pct (to 2 decimal places), and greenspace_tier ('adequate' if park_pct >= 10.0, 'marginal' if 5.0 <= park_pct < 10.0, and 'deficient' if park_pct < 5.0). Produce a summary CSV at /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/greenspace_equity_summary.csv containing the greenspace_tier, tract_count, total_pop, and avg_park_pct for each of the three tiers.
